title: CrystalExtension
description: Category extension for crystals and resonators (AT-cut quartz, ceramic resonators, TCXO, VCXO, OCXO). Layered on top of base per spec §7. Version 1.0. Field union from ABM8G-106-12.000MHZ-T (Abracon 12 MHz AT-cut SMD crystal, 3.2×2.5×1.0 mm). Phase 3b ships only one full extraction (no second MVP MPN was on the harness sanity-vector list); broader coverage deferred to v1.5 with TCXO/VCXO/OCXO fixtures.

crystal_type.description: Crystal or resonator type. at_cut: standard AT-cut quartz (most common for MHz-range consumer parts). ceramic_resonator: ceramic resonator (lower Q, wider tolerance, cheaper). tcxo: temperature-compensated crystal oscillator (integrated oscillator circuit). vcxo: voltage-controlled crystal oscillator. ocxo: oven-controlled crystal oscillator (highest stability).

frequency.description: Nominal resonant frequency in Hz. Store MHz as Hz (e.g. 12 MHz → 12000000). Store kHz as Hz (e.g. 32.768 kHz → 32768). Evidence from cover page or frequency table.

frequency_tolerance.description: Initial frequency tolerance at +25°C in ppm (unit: 'ppm'). Symmetric tolerance stored as min/max (e.g. ±20 ppm → min=-20, max=20). Condition should note the reference temperature.

frequency_stability.description: Frequency stability over the operating temperature range in ppm (unit: 'ppm'), referenced to +25°C. Stored as min/max symmetric envelope. Condition specifies the temperature range.

aging.description: Long-term frequency aging drift in ppm (unit: 'ppm'). Condition should note the time window (e.g. 'first year'). Stored as min/max symmetric envelope (e.g. ±3 ppm/year → min=-3, max=3). Most datasheets specify aging only for the first year.

load_capacitance.description: Specified load capacitance in Farads (unit: 'F'). Store pF as F (e.g. 12 pF → 1.2e-11, 18 pF → 1.8e-11). This is the capacitance the oscillator circuit must present to the crystal to achieve the nominal frequency. Common values: 8 pF, 10 pF, 12 pF, 18 pF, 20 pF.

motional_capacitance.description: Motional (series) capacitance C1 of the Butterworth–Van Dyke equivalent circuit in Farads (unit: 'F'). Typically 1–3 fF for AT-cut crystals (e.g. 2 fF → 2e-15). Published only for AT-cut quartz; ceramic resonators, TCXO, VCXO, OCXO rarely publish this parameter. Set null when not on the datasheet.

motional_inductance.description: Motional inductance L1 of the Butterworth–Van Dyke equivalent circuit in Henries (unit: 'H'). Typically millihenry to henry range for AT-cut crystals. Published only for AT-cut quartz; ceramic resonators, TCXO, VCXO, OCXO rarely publish this parameter. Set null when not on the datasheet.

esr_max.description: Maximum equivalent series resistance (ESR or R1) in Ohms (unit: 'Ω'). This is a maximum spec — use the max field. Condition may specify frequency and load capacitance. Higher ESR parts require higher oscillator gain.

drive_level_max.description: Maximum allowable crystal excitation power in Watts (unit: 'W'). Store µW as W (e.g. 100 µW → 1e-4). This is a maximum spec — use the max field. Exceeding drive level causes aging acceleration and frequency deviation.

operating_temp_range.description: Operating temperature range in degrees Celsius (unit: '°C'). Stored as min/max. Common grades: commercial (0 to +70°C), industrial (-40 to +85°C), automotive (-40 to +125°C).

mode.description: Resonance mode of operation. fundamental: first overtone (most common for consumer crystals ≤30 MHz). overtone_3rd: third overtone (used for 30–100 MHz range). overtone_5th: fifth overtone (used for higher frequencies). null for ceramic resonators (which operate at fundamental but don't publish this term explicitly), TCXO, VCXO, OCXO (which integrate the oscillator circuit).

package.description: Package physical characteristics. body_mm uses nested object shape (Phase 3b convention — inner keys align with base.schema.json body_mm shape).

code.description: Datasheet package code (e.g. 'SMD-3225', 'SMD-2016', 'HC-49/US', 'SMD-5032'). 3225 = 3.2×2.5 mm, 2016 = 2.0×1.6 mm, etc.

body_mm.description: Package body dimensions in millimeters. Nested object per Phase 3b option A convention. Inner keys (length/width/height) align with base.schema.json's body_mm shape.

length.description: Body length in millimeters along the longest plan-view axis.

width.description: Body width in millimeters along the perpendicular-to-length axis.

height.description: Body height in millimeters (package thickness / standoff direction).
